name: Carlos Mendoza
message: Hi Nina! We are hosting a company event for 40 people on May 15th and would love to have Xubie Snacks cater desserts. Can you put together a quote for assorted banana pudding and Xubie Cake for the group? Budget is flexible if the quality is there.

name: Brianna Scott
message: Hello! I want to order 10 cups of Biscoff Banana Pudding for a bridal shower this Saturday. Can I do a bulk pickup? Also do you do custom labels/stickers for special events?

name: Malik Green
message: Hey, I run a small grocery and specialty foods store in East San Jose. I would love to carry Xubie Snacks products on a consignment or wholesale basis. Who should I talk to about getting product on my shelves?

name: Rachel Kim
message: Just wanted to say the Banana Pudding I ordered last week was absolutely incredible. My whole family loved it. Please never stop making it. Also — any chance you will ever do a chocolate version? Would be a bestseller for sure.

name: James Okafor
message: Hi! I write for a Bay Area food blog called The Bite Report. We cover emerging food brands in the South Bay and I would love to feature Xubie Snacks in our next issue. Would Nina be open to a short interview and some photos at your next pop-up?

name: Destiny Williams
message: What are your hours for pickup? And do you do same-day orders if I contact you in the morning? Also where exactly is the pickup location? The address on the site is a bit unclear.
